about_preview.title: Meet Aluh
about_preview.text: With a passion for beauty and a commitment to personalized care, Aluh creates an experience where every client feels seen, valued, and beautiful. Her attention to detail and warm approach set the foundation for lasting results and genuine connections.

items.name: Maria L.
items.text: Aluh understood exactly what I wanted. My hair has never looked this good. I feel like a new person!

items.name: Sofia R.
items.text: The attention to detail is incredible. Every visit feels like a treat, and I always leave with nails I love showing off.

items.name: Ana P.
items.text: Finally found someone who gets my brows right. The results are natural, clean, and exactly what I wanted.

booking_cta.subtitle: Let's create something beautiful together. Book your session today.

footer.brand_description: Personalized beauty services designed to make you feel confident and radiant.

about_page.title: About Aluh
about_page.intro: More than a beauty service — a personalized experience built on trust, care, and attention to detail.
about_page.story: Beauty has always been my passion. From a young age, I was drawn to the art of enhancing natural features and helping people feel confident in their own skin. What started as a personal passion grew into Aluh — a space where every client is treated as an individual, not a number.
about_page.philosophy: I believe beauty should feel effortless, personal, and empowering. Every service I offer is guided by this principle: understand what makes each client unique, and enhance it with care, skill, and the best products available.
difference_items: Genuine one-on-one attention for every appointment
Carefully selected premium products and tools
A clean, comfortable, and welcoming environment
Ongoing education to bring you the latest techniques
A results-driven approach tailored to your features
about_page.commitment: Your trust means everything. I am committed to providing an experience that not only meets your expectations but exceeds them. From the moment you book to the moment you leave, every detail matters.

services_page.title: Our Services
services_page.subtitle: Every service is thoughtfully designed to highlight your natural beauty and leave you feeling your absolute best.
services_page.consult_title: Not Sure Which Service Is Right for You?
services_page.consult_text: Contact us before booking — we're happy to help you choose the perfect service.

faq_page.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_page.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: You can book through our website by visiting the Book page and filling out the request form. We'll confirm your appointment within 24 hours.

items.question: Do you accept same-day appointments?
items.answer: Same-day appointments are subject to availability. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance for the best selection of times.

items.question: What if I need to reschedule?
items.answer: We understand plans change. Please contact us at least 24 hours before your appointment to reschedule without a fee.

items.question: Do you require a deposit?
items.answer: A deposit may be required for certain services such as lash extensions, bridal packages, and event bookings. Details are provided at the time of booking.

items.question: Which service should I choose if I'm not sure?
items.answer: No worries! Contact us through the booking form or send us a message, and we'll help you find the perfect service for your needs.

items.question: How should I prepare before my appointment?
items.answer: Preparation depends on the service. Generally, arrive with clean skin/hair and avoid caffeine before facial treatments. Specific instructions will be shared when your appointment is confirmed.

items.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, credit/debit cards, and popular digital payment methods. Payment details are confirmed at booking.

policies_page.title: Our Policies
policies_page.subtitle: Please review our policies to ensure a smooth and enjoyable experience.

sections.title: Cancellations
sections.content: We kindly ask that you provide at least 24 hours notice if you need to cancel your appointment. Late cancellations may be subject to a cancellation fee.

sections.title: Deposits
sections.content: Certain services require a non-refundable deposit at the time of booking. This deposit is applied toward the total cost of your service. Deposit requirements will be communicated clearly before confirmation.

sections.title: Late Arrivals
sections.content: We value your time and ours. If you arrive more than 15 minutes late, we may need to shorten your service or reschedule to avoid impacting other clients.

sections.title: No-Shows
sections.content: Missed appointments without prior notice may result in a no-show fee and may affect future booking privileges.

sections.title: Touch-Up Policy
sections.content: If you're not fully satisfied with your results, please contact us within 7 days of your appointment to discuss a complimentary touch-up. Touch-ups are available at our discretion and subject to scheduling.

sections.title: Consultation Requirements
sections.content: Some services, including color corrections, bridal packages, and certain skin treatments, may require a consultation before booking. This helps us understand your needs and deliver the best results.
